creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm not sure this solves the problem. When portrevision increases, but
${WRKSRC} does not change, the second build will still hit the files
left from the first one, no?

You should really clean up after every build.

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

Two sausages are in a frying pan. One says, "Geez, it's hot in here isn't it?"
And the other one says, "Aaaaaah! A talking sausage!"
